description: Use this API to modify or add new harmonics Two Terminal DC data to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_2tdc(name,ibus,intgar,charar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Two term dc line name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Rectifier or inverter bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
